rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added data_flow b1->b4 to connect declaration to its usage in the conditional block.
Added data_flow b2->b4 to connect declaration to its usage in the conditional block.
Added data_flow inputs from b1 and b2 to b4's condition, resolving the flow mismatch by providing necessary data dependencies.
Added data_flow b9->b12 to connect the assignment to its nearest downstream usage.
Added data_flow b11->b12 to connect the assignment to its nearest downstream usage.
Added data_flow b12->b13, b12->b14, b12->b16, b12->b18 to connect the assignment to its various downstream usages and return points.
Added data_flow b12->b13 to provide condition input for the control_if block.
Added data_flow b12->b14 to connect the return statement to its nearest assignment.
Added data_flow b12->b16 to connect the return statement to its nearest assignment.
Added data_flow b12->b18 to connect the return statement to its nearest assignment.
